metadata.notes: Diagnostic PZU color caution baseline after manual review: current 320-box run minus two confirmed false positive 07_L7 long-L rescues. Full boxes are checked for this fixture, but the fixture is not release-gating truth and must not be used for PZU-specific detector rules.

manualSentinels.description: Magenta ROI should resolve to 20_sym_01.
True red wavy TB11 should survive near the KPP area.
Upper connected magenta symbol should resolve to 21_sym_02.
Second true red wavy TB11 should survive.
Gray/black L3 text must not become final color pictogram output.
This local pictogram area is not a valid 09_L9 detection.
Gray/black L3 text at this spot must not become final color output.
Second gray/black L3 text must not become final color output.
True red wavy TB11 should survive at the tighter KPP ROI.
True red wavy TB11 at the left KPP wave should be detected, not only a nearby sibling wave.
True TB11 wave cluster must not also be reported as a rescued long L-family stick.
Isolated magenta symbol should resolve to 20_sym_01.
Isolated magenta 20_sym_01 at the tight ROI should be detected, not only a nearby larger replacement.
Long red L-family stick must not be accepted as 28_TB11.
Long red L-family stick with local L10 label should resolve to 10_L10 here.
Second long red L-family stick with local L10 label should resolve to 10_L10 here.
Long red stick can be any real long L-family class here, but not TB11.
This long red L-family ROI must not be reported as 28_TB11.
Green evacuation pictogram at this ROI should resolve to 19_EW2.
Green evacuation pictogram at this ROI should resolve to 18_EW1.
Green evacuation pictogram at this ROI should resolve to 19_EW2.
Green evacuation pictogram at this ROI should resolve to 19_EW2.
Green evacuation pictogram at this ROI should resolve to 18_EW1.
Upper/full magenta connected symbol should resolve to 21_sym_02.
Connected magenta symbol should resolve to 21_sym_02.
Upper magenta stack symbol should resolve to 21_sym_02.
Duplicate 22_sym_03 boxes at the same location should collapse to one final detection.
Duplicate 22_sym_03 boxes at the same location should collapse to one final detection.
Green evacuation pictogram at this ROI should resolve to 18_EW1.
Green evacuation pictogram at this ROI should resolve to 19_EW2.
Red block at this raw ROI should resolve to 02_L2, not 01_L1.
Green evacuation pictogram at this ROI should resolve to 18_EW1.
Long vertical red L-family stick at this ROI should resolve to 07_L7.
Second long vertical red L-family stick at this ROI should resolve to 07_L7.
Magenta symbol at this ROI should resolve to 21_sym_02.
Green evacuation pictogram at this ROI should resolve to 19_EW2.
Manual false positive: empty/wrong 07_L7 long-L rescue must not appear here.
Manual false positive: empty/wrong 07_L7 long-L rescue must not appear here.
